description: Calibrated offsets from played-games-only backtest (82k records, April-Sept 2025). Excludes non-plays (actual=0) which artificially inflated LESS accuracy by 10-25pp. Offsets = actual - projection to correct underprojections (especially fantasy_score +1.23, total_bases +0.78).

improvements.root_cause_fix: Identified non-play inflation: 21-44% of backtest picks had actual=0 (players who didn't bat). These artificial 0s created false LESS wins and MORE losses. By filtering to played-games-only, we found true projection bias.
improvements.offset_recalibration: pitcher_strikeouts was -0.67 in v005 but should be +0.57 (projection 5.53 vs actual 4.96 when played). total_bases -0.22→-0.77, hitter_fantasy_score -1.07→-1.21, hits -0.12→-0.48, home_runs -0.02→-0.93
improvements.expectation: With v006 offsets, MORE picks should improve from 40-42% to ~50-55%, LESS should stay ~65-70%, overall ~65-67%

metadata.notes: CRITICAL: Non-plays were in backtest because extract_all_batters() filter is checking SEASON stats PA (>= 2), not ACTUAL game PA. Players like Max Muncy had 200+ season PA but 0 game PA on certain dates. These should be filtered by actual game PA. Future backtest enhancement: add actual_game_pa >= 1 check after grading.
